sections.paragraph:
Original: אחר

Transliteration: 'achar

Phonetic: akh-ar'

BDB Definition:

  1. after the following part, behind (of place), hinder, afterwards (of time)
    1. as an adverb
      1. behind (of place)
      2. afterwards (of time)
    2. as a preposition
      1. behind, after (of place)
      2. after (of time)
      3. besides
    3. as a conjunction
    4. after that
    5. as a substantive
      1. hinder part
    6. with other prepositions
      1. from behind
      2. from following after

Origin: from H309

TWOT entry: 68b, 68c

Part(s) of speech: Adverb Preposition Conjunction
